Package nonprofitbookkeeping.ui.actions

Class ReportGenerator

java.lang.Object
nonprofitbookkeeping.ui.actions.ReportGenerator
public class ReportGenerator extends Object
Utility class for generating Excel-based reports using JXLS templates and Apache POI. This class focuses on creating ledger reports, potentially with multiple sheets representing different accounts and a summary cover sheet. It assumes data is provided via a static beans map, which needs to be populated beforehand.

  • Method Details

    • generateSingleSheet

      public static org.apache.poi.ss.usermodel.Workbook generateSingleSheet(File templateFile, LedgerReportContext context) throws IOException
      Generates a single Excel sheet (as a Workbook object in memory) based on a JXLS template file and a given LedgerReportContext. The context provides the account name and entries to populate the template.
      Parameters:
      templateFile - The JXLS template File (e.g., an .xlsx file with JXLS markup).
      context - The LedgerReportContext containing data for the report, including the account name and a list of LedgerEntry objects.
      Returns:
      A new Apache POI Workbook (specifically XSSFWorkbook for .xlsx) containing the processed sheet.
      Throws:
      IOException - If an error occurs during file input/output operations or while processing the JXLS template.

    • generateReport

      public static void generateReport(File outputFile, File templateFile) throws IOException, org.apache.poi.ss.formula.FormulaParseException, IllegalStateException, FileNotFoundException
      Generates a multi-sheet Excel ledger report and saves it to the specified output file. This method iterates through ledger entries (assumed to be pre-populated in the static beans map), groups them by account (specifically entry.assetAccount), and generates a separate sheet for each account using generateSingleSheet(File, LedgerReportContext). It also creates a "Cover" sheet summarizing the accounts and entry counts.

      Note: This method relies on the static beans map being populated correctly before invocation. The grouping logic currently uses entry.assetAccount as the key; this might need adjustment depending on the desired report structure.

      Parameters:
      outputFile - The File where the generated Excel report will be saved. If the file exists, it will be overwritten.
      templateFile - The JXLS template File used for generating individual account sheets.
      Throws:
      IOException - If an error occurs during file input/output operations, JXLS template processing, or workbook writing.
      org.apache.poi.ss.formula.FormulaParseException - If there's an error parsing a formula during sheet copying (less likely with current cell-by-cell copy).
      IllegalStateException - If an issue occurs with cell types during copying (less likely with current cell-by-cell copy).
      FileNotFoundException - If the templateFile is not found.
      NullPointerException - If the static beans map is null when accessed.
